_meta: v1.1.0 | validated 2026-07-01 (DC re-verified 2026-07-16) | US statewide base sales-tax rates. state_bps = basis points at quarter-bps resolution (1% = 100 bps; values exact multiples of 0.25, exact in IEEE-754). state_bps is the minimum combined statewide rate (Tax Foundation convention; decompositions in source). scheduled_change = enacted future rate with effective date. Validated against official state DOR/tax-authority sources 2026-07-01 (DC re-verified 2026-07-16). See SCHEMA.md.

AK.name: Alaska
AK.source: no statewide tax; ~110 of 162 municipalities levy 1-7% local

CA.name: California
CA.source: CA CDTFA (7.25% floor = 6% state + 1.25% mandatory uniform local; districts add 0.10-2.00%)

CT.name: Connecticut
CT.source: CT DRS (state-only; 7.75% luxury / 1% computer-services category rates exist)

DE.name: Delaware
DE.source: no sales tax (seller-side gross receipts tax exists — not billable to buyers)

FL.name: Florida
FL.source: FL DOR (county surtax has $5,000 single-item cap)

HI.name: Hawaii
HI.source: HI DOTAX (GET on seller; county surcharge 0.5%; max pass-on 4.712%)

ID.name: Idaho
ID.source: ID STC (locals only in resort cities/auditorium districts)

IA.name: Iowa
IA.source: IA DOR (1% LOST in most jurisdictions)

LA.name: Louisiana
LA.source: LA DOR (5% since 2025-01-01, Act 11; parish/municipal locals substantial)

MD.name: Maryland
MD.source: MD Comptroller (state-only; category rates exist: 9% alcohol, 3% data/IT services)

MA.name: Massachusetts
MA.source: MA DOR (state-only for tangible goods; local option is meals/lodging only)

MO.name: Missouri
MO.source: MO DOR (exactly 4.225% = 3.0 GR + 1.0 Education + 0.125 Conservation + 0.10 Parks/Soils)

MT.name: Montana
MT.source: no sales tax (resort-community taxes on lodging/prepared food only)

NE.name: Nebraska
NE.source: NE DOR (Good Life District addresses: state rate 2.75% since 2024-07-01)

NV.name: Nevada
NV.source: NV DOT (6.85% mandatory-minimum combined: 2.00 state + 2.60 LSST + 0.50 BCCRT + 1.75 SCCRT; county options on top)

NH.name: New Hampshire
NH.source: no sales tax (8.5% meals & rentals is category-specific)

NJ.name: New Jersey
NJ.source: NJ Treasury (exactly 6.625%, uniform statewide; UEZ/Salem County REDUCED rates exist for qualified sellers)

NM.name: New Mexico
NM.source: NM TRD (GRT exactly 4.875%; rates change only each Jul 1 — re-verify annually)

NY.name: New York
NY.source: NY DTF (locals + 0.375% MCTD surcharge in metro district)

PA.name: Pennsylvania
PA.source: PA DOR (locals are exactly two: Allegheny +1%, Philadelphia +2%)

TX.name: Texas
TX.source: TX Comptroller (locals up to 2%; 8.25% max combined)

UT.name: Utah
UT.source: UT TC (6.10% mandatory-minimum combined: 4.85 state + 1.00 local option + 0.25 county option; optional levies to ~9.05%)

VT.name: Vermont
VT.source: VT DOT (1% local option where adopted)

VA.name: Virginia
VA.source: VA TAX (5.3% floor = 4.3% state + 1.0% mandatory local; regional totals 6.0/6.3/7.0%)

WV.name: West Virginia
WV.source: WV Tax Div (municipal add-ons all currently 1%)

WI.name: Wisconsin
WI.source: WI DOR (counties +0.5%; Milwaukee Co. 0.9%; City of Milwaukee 2.0%)

DC.name: Washington, D.C.
DC.source: 6.5% effective 2025-10-01, 7.0% effective 2026-10-01 per DC OTR notice
